[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100101 3
1 110000011 4
2 000101000 2
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 010000001 2
7 010100000 2

01 10 010001000 2
12 21 000111000 3
23 32 000001000 1
34 43 000000000 a match 3 4 5
45 54 000000001 1
56 65 010100101 4
67 76 100100101 4
70 07 100001001 3

02 20 000001011 3
13 31 010001000 2
24 42 000000001 1
35 53 010000000 1
46 64 100000001 2
57 75 000100101 3 match 0
60 06 110000011 4 match 1
71 17 000101000 2 match 2

03 30 010001000 2
14 41 000000000 a match 3 4 5
25 52 000100101 3 match 0
36 63 010000000 1
47 74 100000001 2
50 05 010000001 2 match 6
61 16 010100000 2 match 7
72 27 000101101 4

04 40 100000001 2
15 51 010100000 2 match 7
26 62 000100111 4
37 73 000001000 1
